title: VDD parsing: extract_json_from_response uses byte slicing that panics on multibyte input
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Dimension: Functional Correctness. Location: src/vdd/parsing.rs:19-72. Violation: L24 uses text[json_start..json_start + end] where json_start = start + 7 (byte offset past ```json). If adversary response contains multibyte UTF-8 (emoji, CJK) near the fence, the offset may land inside a codepoint. str slicing on non-char-boundary panics. Same for L35 and L68 text[start..=end]. Adversary-controlled input can crash parse_findings mid-blocking_loop. Mandated Refactor: Replace all byte-index slicing with char-boundary-safe access via .get(range) returning Option. Add a unit test with a 4-byte UTF-8 character before the JSON fence.
